full_text:
Cao Shu 曹淑
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cao Shu (曹淑). Cao Rui’s daughter and fourth child. Died in infancy. Cao Shu was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Cao Shu lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
